We present an application of the LLBe model by simulating Heat-Assisted magnetic recording on a thin magnetic track with local heating, demonstrating the multi-scale finite-temperature capabilities of the LLBe.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于朗道-利夫希茨方程和伯努利微分方程的多尺度有限温度微磁模型（LLBe模型），该模型能够从低于到高于居里温度一致预测磁体性质，并成功应用于热辅助磁记录模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有微磁模型在有限温度下（尤其是跨越居里温度时）难以统一描述顺磁和铁磁行为，且无法直接桥接原子尺度模拟与微磁学，需要一种多尺度、跨温度的连续模型。
AI.method: 将Landau-Lifshitz方程与Bernoulli微分方程耦合，构建LLBe模型，使模型在高温下还原经典麦克斯韦顺磁静力学，在低温下还原传统微磁学，并实现与原子尺度模拟的直接耦合。
AI.result: 与MUMAX3（零温微磁）和FEMCE（高温顺磁静力学）对比验证，模型准确复现了经典结果；热辅助磁记录模拟展示了多尺度有限温度能力。
AI.conclusion: LLBe模型是一种兼具理论一致性和实用性的多尺度有限温度微磁框架，有望成为连接原子模拟与宏观磁模拟的桥梁工具。

title: Disentangling Spin Pumping and Two-Magnon Scattering Contributions to Gilbert Damping in YIG/V Bilayers
summary: In this work, we investigate the magnetic damping and spin pumping response of YIG-based bilayers incorporating vanadium (V) as the normal metal layer via broadband ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) measurements as a function of YIG thickness. We show that the apparent enhancement of the Gilbert damping in YIG/V bilayers cannot be solely attributed to spin pumping. Instead, two-magnon scattering (TMS) plays a dominant role in governing the thickness dependence of the damping in the nanometer regime. By applying a thickness-dependent damping model that accounts for both spin pumping and two-magnon scattering contributions, we successfully disentangle the different relaxation contributions. Our analysis reveals that neglecting two-magnon scattering leads to an overestimation of the spin-pumping contribution and consequently to unphysically large values of the effective spin-mixing conductance. After isolating the intrinsic spin pumping contribution, we extract a thickness-independent effective spin-mixing conductance of $g^{\uparrow\downarrow}_{\mathrm{eff}} = 1.33 \times 10^{18}~\mathrm{m^{-2}}$. These findings provide a more accurate framework for quantifying spin transport parameters in FM/HM systems and emphasize the necessity of accounting for extrinsic damping mechanisms when interpreting spin pumping and inverse spin Hall effect experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过宽频铁磁共振测量研究YIG/V双层膜中的磁阻尼和自旋泵浦效应，发现两磁子散射在纳米尺度阻尼中占主导，分离出本征自旋泵浦贡献后得到有效的自旋混合电导。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常将YIG/重金属双层膜中阻尼增强归因于自旋泵浦，但忽略了其他弛豫机制（如两磁子散射）的影响，导致自旋混合电导被高估。本文旨在准确分离不同阻尼贡献，建立更可靠的定量框架。
AI.method: 采用宽频铁磁共振测量YIG厚度依赖的阻尼特性，建立包含自旋泵浦和两磁子散射贡献的厚度依赖阻尼模型，从而分解不同的弛豫贡献。
AI.result: YIG/V双层膜中阻尼增强不能仅归因于自旋泵浦，两磁子散射在纳米厚度区间占主导。忽略两磁子散射会导致自旋泵浦贡献被高估，提取的本征有效自旋混合电导为 $1.33 \times 10^{18}~\mathrm{m^{-2}}$，且与厚度无关。
AI.conclusion: 在FM/HM体系的泵浦和逆自旋霍尔效应实验中，必须考虑两磁子散射等外在阻尼机制，才能准确量化自旋输运参数。

title: Universal thermokinetic decomposition of short-time information fluctuations
summary: Biological, artificial, and physical systems dissipate energy to accurately transmit information. While tools of information theory have been used to characterize information-processing capabilities, how reliably this information is acquired along individual trajectories, and which aspects require a thermodynamic cost, is an open question. In this work, we focus on the stochastic predictability of an arbitrary Langevin dynamics, defined as the pointwise mutual information between the current and future states of a system. We show that the fluctuations of predictability obey a universal thermokinetic decomposition at short times, which reveals that information fluctuations are suppressed by energy dissipation and become stronger with increased dynamical activity. Remarkably, we find that the average predictability, i.e., the short-time mutual information, does not carry any dependence on the underlying thermodynamic and kinetic features. Thus, the role of dissipation at short times is not to enhance information, but to reduce its fluctuations. Such dissipative control is effective only when instantiated by nonlinear operations. Moreover, energy consumption governs short- and long-time precision in stochastic oscillators through structurally different mechanisms that can be independently tuned. Our decomposition offers a fundamental thermodynamic basis for understanding the reliability of information transmission in nonequilibrium systems, the constraints on precision in biological systems, and the design of energy-limited control strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过点态互信息定义随机系统的可预测性，发现短时信息波动受能量耗散抑制，但平均可预测性不受热力学特征影响，揭示耗散的作用是降低不确定性而非增强信息量。
AI.motivation: 现有信息论工具可描述系统信息处理能力，但信息沿单条轨迹获取的可靠性及其热力学成本尚不明确，因此作者聚焦于随机动力学的可预测性波动问题。
AI.method: 作者以Langevin动力学为框架，定义点态互信息（当前状态与未来状态之间）作为随机可预测性的度量，在短时间极限下推导出可预测性波动的热力学-动力学分解公式。
AI.result: 1) 可预测性波动满足普适的热力学-动力学分解，能量耗散抑制波动，动力学活性增强波动；2) 平均可预测性（短时互信息）与热力学/动力学特征无关；3) 耗散需通过非线性操作才能有效控制波动；4) 随机振荡器中能量消耗通过不同机制影响短时与长时精度。
AI.conclusion: 该分解为理解非平衡系统中信息传输可靠性提供了热力学基础，对生物系统精度约束和能量有限控制策略设计具有指导意义。

title: Electronic correlations driving Chirality-Induced Spin Selectivity
summary: We explicitly account for electron-electron interactions when modeling low-dimensional helical organic molecules. We show that competition between various hopping channels, together with interaction-induced double- and superexchange mechanisms, can stabilize non-collinear helical magnetic order. The resulting single-electron bands exhibit partial spin polarization, a manifestation of $p$-wave magnetism. Using density-matrix renormalization group, cluster perturbation theory, and Monte Carlo methods, we find that even vanishingly small spin-orbit coupling triggers strong spin selectivity at temperatures significantly above the spin-orbit scale. While strong correlations are essential for this mechanism, long-range spin ordering is not required. We thus propose non-collinear spin correlations driven by Coulomb interactions as an explanation of chirality-induced spin selectivity and discuss connections to experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过考虑电子-电子相互作用，发现低维螺旋有机分子中相互作用诱导的非共线磁序可以产生自旋选择性，为手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）效应提供了新解释。
AI.motivation: 解释手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）效应的微观物理机制，尤其是电子-电子相互作用在其中的关键作用。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重正化群、簇微扰理论和蒙特卡洛方法，对低维螺旋有机分子中的电子相互作用和自旋轨道耦合进行建模分析。
AI.result: 发现竞争性跳迁通道与相互作用诱导的双交换/超交换机制可稳定非共线螺旋磁序；即使极小的自旋轨道耦合也能在远高于自旋轨道能标的温度下触发强自旋选择性；强关联是关键，但长程自旋有序并非必需。
AI.conclusion: 提出库仑相互作用驱动的非共线自旋关联是CISS效应的新机制，并与实验结果进行了讨论。

title: Transition metal (group V) doping induced spin and valley polarization in MoS$_2$ monolayer
summary: Doping in two-dimensional materials has emerged as an effective tool for modulating their electronic properties and thereby enabling their multifunctional applications. In this work, we present a first-principles study on induced effective magnetic moment and metallicity in MoS$_2$ monolayer by substitutional doping of group-5 transition metal (TM) elements -- V, Nb and Ta. From our study, we observe that the V doping induces half-metallicity, whereas metallic characteristics are observed in the case of Nb and Ta doping. Moreover, V and Ta-doped MoS$_2$ monolayers are observed to show total induced magnetic moments of 0.922 and 0.624 $μ_{\rm B}$, respectively. Importantly, the combined effects of strong spin-orbit coupling (SOC), broken inversion symmetry, and structural asymmetry is observed to lead to a permanent valley polarization in the V- and Ta-MoS$_2$ systems. In particular, we observed a valley polarization of 121 and 21 meVs for V and Ta-doped MoS$_2$, respectively. Furthermore, an enhanced piezoelectric coefficient for the doped systems is observed compared to pristine MoS$_2$. Notably, the simultaneous presence of half-metallicity, substantial valley polarization, and enhanced piezoelectricity in V-doped MoS$_2$ establishes this system as a promising multifunctional platform for next-generation spintronic, valleytronic, and piezoelectric nanodevices. Overall, our findings provide fundamental insights into engineering coupled spin-valley-mechanical degrees of freedom in two-dimensional materials for advanced quantum and nanoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了第V族过渡金属（V、Nb、Ta）替代掺杂对MoS₂单层电子特性的影响。发现V掺杂诱导半金属性，V和Ta掺杂产生磁矩和谷极化（分别为121和21 meV），且掺杂体系压电系数增强。V掺杂的MoS₂同时具备半金属性、显著谷极化和增强压电性，是自旋电子学、谷电子学和压电纳米器件的多功能平台。
AI.motivation: 二维材料掺杂可有效调控其电子特性，实现多功能应用。作者希望通过过渡金属掺杂在MoS₂中同时引入磁性、金属性、谷极化和压电性，探索多自由度耦合的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理（密度泛函理论）计算，对MoS₂单层进行第V族过渡金属（V、Nb、Ta）替代掺杂，分析其电子结构、磁性质、谷极化及压电系数。
AI.result: 1) V掺杂诱导半金属性，Nb和Ta掺杂诱导金属性；2) V和Ta掺杂分别产生0.922和0.624 μB的磁矩；3) 强自旋-轨道耦合、对称性破缺和结构不对称导致永久谷极化（V: 121 meV, Ta: 21 meV）；4) 掺杂体系压电系数相比纯MoS₂增强。
AI.conclusion: V掺杂MoS₂同时具备半金属性、显著谷极化和增强压电性，是多功能自旋-谷-压电纳米器件的理想平台。研究为在二维材料中工程化自旋-谷-力学耦合自由度提供了基础见解。

title: Generation of Bloch Points with Controlled Spin Texture Using Geometrical Boundary Conditions
comment: main manuscript: 15 pages and 5 figures; supplement: 12 pages including 7 figures
summary: Bloch points are three-dimensional topological singularities in magnetization that play a key role in topological transformations of spin textures, such as skyrmion creation or annihilation. While topology often enforces the existence of Bloch points in confined geometries like cylindrical nanowires, deterministic control over their position and magnetic configuration remains challenging. Here we demonstrate the generation of Bloch points with controlled spin texture by engineering geometrical boundary conditions in three-dimensional nanomagnets. By introducing a chirality interface between two three-dimensional double-helix nanowires of opposite handedness, forming a kinked, non-collinear structure, we impose competing topological constraints that uniquely define the magnetization configuration surrounding the Bloch point. A saturating magnetic field nucleates head-to-head or tail-to-tail domain configurations at the chirality interface, producing a Bloch-point domain wall with deterministic polarity, circulation and helicity. This geometrical approach enables full three-dimensional control of Bloch point domain walls allowing deterministic engineering of their spin texture and its selective coupling to current-induced Oersted fields.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在三维纳米磁体中设计几何边界条件（手性界面），实现了对布洛赫点自旋织构的确定性控制，成功生成了具有确定极性、旋性和手性的布洛赫点畴壁。
AI.motivation: 布洛赫点在拓扑自旋织构变换（如斯格明子的产生/湮灭）中起关键作用，但对其位置和磁构型的确定性控制仍具挑战。
AI.method: 在三维纳米磁体中引入两个相反手性的双螺旋纳米线之间的手性界面（扭结非共线结构），施加饱和磁场在界面处产生头对头或尾对尾的畴构型，形成具有确定极性的布洛赫点畴壁。
AI.result: 成功实现了布洛赫点畴壁的确定性生成，具有可控的极性、旋性和手性，并实现了与电流感应奥斯特场的选择性耦合。
AI.conclusion: 这种几何方法实现了布洛赫点畴壁的完整三维控制，为确定性工程化其自旋织构及与外部场的耦合提供了新途径。

title: Hidden Ising models from the generalized Yang-Baxter equation
summary: We introduce a one dimensional spin $\frac{1}{2}$ Hamiltonian with multi-site interactions, but still local. The algebra of its Hamiltonian densities resembles that of the transverse field Ising model. Using this fact we show that its spectrum is free-fermionic but with a huge degeneracy for each level. The source of the degeneracy is a set of local conserved quantities that act like a classical background field for the quantum system. The thermodynamics of this system is contrasted with the standard Ising model. At the gapless points in the energy spectrum, we show that this system can be derived from the quantum inverse scattering method adapted to a multi-site generalization of the Yang-Baxter equation as introduced by E. Rowell and Z. Wang. The $R$-matrix is constructed using generators of extraspecial 2-groups. This helps us extract all the conserved charges and lay the framework for a general mechanism to generate such multi-site interaction spin systems that are transverse field Ising models under the hood. A remark on how to obtain P. Fendley's free-fermion in disguise models in this formalism is also included.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有多体相互作用的局域自旋1/2哈密顿量，其密度代数类似于横场伊辛模型，因此谱是自由费米子型的但具有巨大简并性。通过量子反散射方法和推广的Yang-Baxter方程，作者构造了R矩阵并揭示了隐藏的横场伊辛结构。
AI.motivation: 探索多体相互作用自旋系统的可解性，寻找超越传统近邻相互作用但依然保持可积性的模型，并揭示其与横场伊辛模型的内在联系。
AI.method: 利用哈密顿量密度代数与横场伊辛模型的相似性证明自由费米子谱；通过量子反散射方法和多体位点推广的Yang-Baxter方程构造R矩阵（基于超特殊2-群生成元）；利用局部守恒量解释简并性。
AI.result: 发现系统谱是自由费米子型但具有巨大能级简并；在无隙点可通过推广的Yang-Baxter方程导出；R矩阵由超特殊2-群构造；揭示了隐藏的横场伊辛模型结构。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一类多体相互作用自旋系统的可积性框架，这些系统本质上是"披着外衣"的横场伊辛模型，并指出可与Fendley的自由费米子伪装模型相联系。

title: Spectroscopic evidence for a molecular orbital Kondo insulator
summary: A Kondo insulator (KI) is a prototypical example of a highly entangled phase of matter, where many-body interactions between local moments and delocalized electrons engender the non-magnetic insulating ground state. Conventionally, the local moments arise from atomic multiplet states with a narrow bandwidth, limiting Kondo coherence to low temperatures. Here, we realize a new paradigm for constructing the KI state with hybridized molecular orbitals in FeSb2. Resonant inelastic X-ray scattering (RIXS) at the Fe L-edge reveals distinct signatures of band-like continuum states and localized states. Comparisons with first-principles calculations establish a mixed-configuration ground state with hybridized Fe d-Sb p molecular orbitals as basis states. By systematically investigating the RIXS momentum, temperature, and doping dependences, we find propagating collective modes commensurate with many-body charge and spin excitations. Our results pave the way for understanding the emerging class of unconventional d electron insulators and engineering high temperature Kondo many-body states.

AI.tldr: 本文在FeSb₂材料中实现了基于杂化分子轨道的新型Kondo绝缘体（KI）态，通过共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）实验和第一性原理计算，揭示了混合电子构型基态以及传播性集体激发模式，为理解非常规d电子绝缘体和工程化高温Kondo多体态提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 传统Kondo绝缘体（KI）中局域磁矩来自原子多重态，带宽窄，导致Kondo相干温度低。作者希望突破这一局限，通过在FeSb₂中利用杂化分子轨道构建新型KI态，实现更高温度的Kondo多体相干性。
AI.method: 利用Fe L-edge的共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）实验，系统测量动量、温度和掺杂依赖性；结合第一性原理计算进行对比分析，揭示混合电子构型基态和集体激发模式。
AI.result: 观察到能带连续态和局域态的明显特征；建立了Fe d-Sb p杂化分子轨道作为基态的混合电子构型；发现了与多体电荷和自旋激发相称的传播性集体模式。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作开辟了理解非常规d电子绝缘体的新方向，为实现工程化高温Kondo多体态奠定了基础。

title: Spin-Orbit Coupling Effects on the Structural and Electronic Properties of Planar Pentagonal p-MS$_{2}$ (M = Si, Ge, and Pb)
summary: Spin-orbit coupling (SOC) plays an important role in determining the structural and electronic properties of recently proposed two-dimensional planar pentagonal materials. In this work, density functional theory calculations are employed to investigate SOC effects in p-MS$_{2}$ systems (M = Si, Ge, and Pb). Our results indicate that the p-SiS$_{2}$ structure is likely unstable, except for p-GeS$_{2}$ and p-PbS$_{2}$. A detailed j-resolved (total angular momentum) orbital analysis reveals that SOC enhances electronic localization, leading to a slight structural contraction and a reconstruction of electronic states near the Fermi level, this effect becoming stronger for heavier M atoms. While p-GeS$_{2}$ remains metallic, SOC drives a metal-semiconductor transition in p-PbS$_{2}$ and opening a quasi-direct band gap of about 0.475 eV. In addition, the conduction band minimum state of p-PbS$_{2}$ exhibits pronounced anisotropy along the S-S bonds. These findings provide insight into SOC-driven structural and electronic reconstruction in planar pentagonal chalcogenides p-MS$_{2}$ and suggest that p-PbS$_{2}$ may be a promising candidate for gas-sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT计算研究自旋轨道耦合(SOC)对二维五边形p-MS₂(M=Si, Ge, Pb)体系的影响，发现SOC增强电子局域化，导致结构收缩和电子态重构；p-PbS₂在SOC驱动下发生金属-半导体转变，打开约0.475 eV准直接带隙，其导带底表现出显著各向异性，有望用于气体传感。
AI.motivation: 自旋轨道耦合(SOC)对二维五边形材料的结构和电子性质具有重要影响，但目前对其在p-MS₂体系中的具体作用机制理解不足，需要系统研究。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，结合j分辨（总角动量）轨道分析，研究SOC对p-MS₂（M=Si, Ge, Pb）体系的结构和电子性质的影响。
AI.result: p-SiS₂结构不稳定；SOC导致电子局域化增强，引起结构收缩和费米能级附近电子态重构，且效应随M原子加重而增强；p-PbS₂在SOC作用下发生金属-半导体转变，打开约0.475 eV准直接带隙，导带底沿S-S键方向呈现显著各向异性。
AI.conclusion: SOC对五边形p-MS₂体系的结构和电子性质有显著调控作用，p-PbS₂因SOC驱动的金属-半导体转变和优异的各向异性特征，有望成为气体传感应用的候选材料。

title: Zeeman Pumping of Higgs Bosons in the Balian--Werthamer State
summary: Based on equations of motion of an SO(5) pseudo-spin, we demonstrate a quantum quench protocol using the magnetic pulse to excite an $\textit{undamped}$ heavy Higgs boson in the Balian--Werthamer superfluid (or superconductor). To achieve that, it is essential to include the dipolar interaction in the effective Hamiltonian and to calculate the ground state self-consistently. The pumped heavy Higgs mode has the twisted angular momentum $J=2$ with the projection $J^{\,}_z=0$ and couples to a well-known light Higgs mode ($J=1$, $J^{\,}_z=0$). The numerical method of 26-point Lebedev quadrature is implemented concretely so as to observe the real-time coupled oscillation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过磁脉冲量子淬火在Balian-Werthamer超流/超导体中激发无阻尼重Higgs玻色子，该模式具有角动量J=2且与光Higgs模式耦合，并采用26点Lebedev求积实现数值模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有研究中重Higgs模式通常存在阻尼，作者希望找到一种无阻尼激发重Higgs玻色子的量子淬火方案。
AI.method: 基于SO(5)赝自旋运动方程，在有效哈密顿量中引入偶极相互作用并自洽计算基态；采用26点Lebedev求积法进行数值实现，观测实时耦合振荡。
AI.result: 成功激发了无阻尼的重Higgs玻色子（J=2, Jz=0），该模式与已知的光Higgs模式（J=1, Jz=0）发生耦合振荡。
AI.conclusion: 偶极相互作用和自洽基态计算是实现无阻尼重Higgs激发的关键，所提方案为研究多分量Higgs模式耦合提供了可行路径。

title: Supercooling of liquids, as described by the Enskog-Vlasov kinetic equation
summary: A model combining Enskog's collision integral for dense fluids with a Vlasov-style description of the van der Waals force is applied to supercooling. First, the spinodal temperature $T_{s}$ is calculated, at which a liquid becomes unstable to small perturbations and transitions to solid. In particular, it turns out that isochoric cooling allows one to reach a lower temperature than isobaric cooling. Second, the surface tension of a supercooled liquid-vapor interface is shown to diverge at $T_{s}$. The singularity is caused by an oscillatory region emerging on the liquid side of the interface as $T\rightarrow T_{s}$; it develops because the liquid approaches instability, and the interface starts radiating (so far, evanescent) waves. At $T=T_{s}$, the waves cease to be evanescent and the oscillatory region extends to infinity -- hence, the singularity of the surface tension. Since this effect has a clear physical interpretation, it should occur regardless of the model and approximations under which it was obtained. This and the other results of the paper are illustrated using argon and several other fluids.

AI.tldr: 本文结合Enskog碰撞积分与Vlasov型范德瓦尔斯力模型，研究了过冷现象。发现等容冷却比等压冷却能达到更低的旋节线温度$T_s$，并揭示过冷液-气界面表面张力在$T_s$处发散，其物理机制是液侧出现振荡区并最终向无穷延伸。
AI.motivation: 研究过冷液体在接近旋节线温度时的稳定性、表面张力行为及其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用Enskog稠密流体碰撞积分与Vlasov型范德瓦尔斯力相结合的理论模型，计算旋节线温度$T_s$，并分析表面张力在$T_s$附近的发散行为。
AI.result: 1) 等容冷却比等压冷却能达到更低的旋节线温度；2) 过冷液-气界面表面张力在$T_s$处发散，源于液侧振荡区随温度趋近$T_s$而出现并最终延伸至无穷。
AI.conclusion: 表面张力在$T_s$处发散的机制具有清晰的物理图像，应独立于具体模型而存在；该结果以氩气等多种流体为例得到验证。

title: Visualizing orbital magnetism in electron doped rhombohedral multilayer graphene
summary: Electron doped rhombohedral multilayer graphene at high displacement field features an exceptionally flat band minimum with near-ideal quantum geometry. Experiments in this regime observe the formation of a 'quarter metal,' in which the electron liquid condenses into a single spin- and valley flavor. Remarkably, recent experiments have found a zero resistance state in the same region of the density- and displacement-field-tuned parameter space, attributed to the formation of a chiral superconductor characterized by a finite-momentum Cooper pair condensate. Here, we use nanoSQUID-on-tip magnetometry to map the orbital magnetization of electron-doped rhombohedral graphene devices ranging in thickness between 3 and 13 layers. Magnetization within the quarter metal phases peaks at finite density, consistent with concentration of the Berry curvature in a finite-momentum 'ring of fire'. Correlating transport and local magnetometry data in a tetralayer sample reveals that the superconducting state has a finite orbital magnetic moment, providing direct evidence of its chiral nature. We further show that widely observed stochastic switching of the resistivity in the metallic regime arises from a density-tuned sign change in the valley-resolved total magnetic moment. This leads to the formation of metastable magnetic domains under typical gate control sequences and can also be harnessed for electric-field controlled switching of orbital moment across the entire device. Unexpectedly, we find magnetic inhomogeneity specific to the apparent normal state of the chiral superconductor, suggestive of a strain-tuned competition between magnetic and non-magnetic ground states. Our results point to a subtle energetic competition underlying the observation of chiral superconductivity in a narrow range of layer numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文利用纳米SQUID-on-tip磁强计技术，研究了电子掺杂菱方多层石墨烯（3-13层）的轨道磁化特性。实验发现四分之一金属相的磁化在有限密度处达到峰值，符合Berry曲率集中在有限动量“火环”的预期。超导态具有有限轨道磁矩，直接证明了其手性超导本质。金属态电阻的随机开关源于谷分辨总磁矩的密度调谐符号变化，导致亚稳磁畴形成。手性超导体的正常态存在磁性不均匀性，暗示应变调制的磁性/非磁性基态竞争。
AI.motivation: 在电子掺杂菱方多层石墨烯的高位移场区域，实验发现了四分之一金属态和零电阻态（被归因于手性超导），但对手性超导的直接磁学证据缺乏，且对金属态电阻随机开关的物理机制尚不清楚。作者希望通过高分辨率磁成像技术直接探测轨道磁化，揭示这些新奇量子态的磁学特征。
AI.method: 使用纳米SQUID-on-tip磁强计，对3至13层的电子掺杂菱方石墨烯器件进行轨道磁化成像；结合输运测量与局域磁测量（四层样品），分析超导态的轨道磁矩；通过门电压调控研究磁化符号变化与电阻开关行为的关系。
AI.result: （1）四分之一金属相中磁化在有限密度处达到峰值，支持Berry曲率集中在有限动量“火环”的理论。（2）四层样品中超导态具有有限轨道磁矩，直接证实了手性超导。（3）金属态电阻随机开关源于谷极化磁矩在密度调控下发生符号变化，形成亚稳磁畴。（4）手性超导体的正常态区域存在磁性不均匀性，暗示应变驱动的磁性/非磁性基态竞争。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了手性超导态的直接磁学证据，揭示了谷极化磁矩符号变化导致电阻开关的物理机制。指出手性超导仅在特定层数范围内出现的原因是磁性与非磁性基态之间微妙的能量竞争，为理解菱方石墨烯中的奇特量子现象提供了重要见解。

title: Breaking Bipartite and Time Reversal Symmetries by Fusing Porphine Unit in-between two Zigzag-edge Graphene Nanoribbons
summary: Hybrid structure of two zigzag-edge graphene nanoribbons with a fused porphine ring in between, results in two distinct nearly degenerate ground states: a semiconducting antiferromagnetic state and a conducting ferromagnetic state with unequal and opposite Fermi velocities of majority and minority spins, the former having slightly higher stability. Such ground states result from the broken bipartite symmetry induced by the porphine ring. The incorporation of different transition metal atoms in the porphine cavity reduces their energy difference but keeps their electronic properties mostly unchanged. The splitting of the $d$-orbitals in the distorted square-planar ligand field of porphine produces a high spin ground state that breaks the global time reversal symmetry ($\mathcal{T}$). The opposite Fermi velocities of the majority and minority spins in the ferromagnetic ground state and lower sensitivity of the conducting majority spin channel to the edge disorder, make this class of quasi-one-dimensional hybrid structures promising for dual spin-filtering device applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种由两个锯齿型石墨烯纳米带与中间融合的卟啉环组成的杂化结构，发现其具有两种近乎简并的基态：反铁磁半导体态和铁磁导体态，后者具有不等速的自旋输运特性，适合用作双自旋过滤器件。
AI.motivation: 探索在石墨烯纳米带中引入卟啉环打破二分对称性后产生的奇异电子基态，以及过渡金属掺杂对其性质的影响，旨在开发新型自旋电子学材料。
AI.method: 通过构建zigzag-edge石墨烯纳米带与卟啉环的杂化结构，利用密度泛函理论计算研究其电子结构和磁性质，并分析过渡金属原子在卟啉空腔中的配位效应。
AI.result: 发现两种近简并基态：反铁磁半导体态稳定性略高，铁磁导体态中多数自旋和少数自旋具有相反方向的费米速度；过渡金属掺杂降低了两者能量差但电子性质基本保持不变；卟啉的畸变四方平面配位场导致d轨道分裂，产生高自旋基态并打破时间反演对称性。
AI.conclusion: 该类杂化结构因其铁磁基态中相反的自旋费米速度以及多数自旋通道对边缘无序的低敏感性，有望用于双自旋过滤器件应用。

title: Macroscopic evidence of spatial modulation of conductivity in a microtextured ferromagnetic film
summary: A 75 nm-thick Fe0.5Pt0.5 film is a ferromagnetic metal showing striped magnetic domains in remanence at room temperature. The magnetoresistance is characterized by varying the external temperature and the in-plane magnetic field intensity, thereby affecting its magnetic structure. Qualitatively, the resistivity is well described by using the generalized Ohm's law. High-field magnetotransport properties are successfully explained by considering the competition between the expected metallic behavior and the electron-magnon interaction. In the low-field condition, we size the contribution of the magnetic texture to the macroscopic magnetotransport response by introducing a new quantity. Consistent with the microscopic modulation of the lateral conduction, low-field measurements reveal inhomogeneities attributed to the spatial distribution of ferromagnetic domains and domain walls. By carefully analyzing the macroscopic response near the coercive field, the additional contribution to the resistivity is attributed to the domain walls themselves. In fact, this term could surpass the anisotropic term at low temperatures. In summary, this study demonstrates that spatial magnetic inhomogeneities are not only macroscopically measurable but also comparable in magnitude to other regularly considered terms, mainly at low temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了75纳米厚Fe0.5Pt0.5铁磁薄膜的磁电阻特性，发现其电阻率可用广义欧姆定律描述，高场下由金属行为与电子-磁子相互作用竞争主导，低场下磁畴壁对电阻的贡献在低温下甚至可超过各向异性项。
AI.motivation: 研究磁畴结构（条纹畴及畴壁）对宏观磁输运性质的具体贡献，并量化空间磁性不均匀性在电阻率中的角色。
AI.method: 通过改变温度和面内磁场强度，测量Fe0.5Pt0.5薄膜的磁电阻，利用广义欧姆定律进行定性分析，引入新物理量来表征低场下磁织构对输运的贡献。
AI.result: 高场下金属行为与电子-磁子相互作用竞争解释输运；低场下磁畴壁贡献可被定量提取，且在低温下可超越各向异性磁电阻项。
AI.conclusion: 空间磁性不均匀性（如畴壁）不仅在宏观上可测量，其贡献在低温下与常规项相当，需在磁输运分析中予以重视。

title: Quantum Spin-5/2 Blume-Capel Model in a Random Transverse-Crystalline Field Anisotropy
summary: In this work, we investigate the thermodynamic properties of the quantum Blume-Capel model with spin \( S = 5/2 \) in the presence of transverse and random crystalline fields. The system is described by a Hamiltonian that includes ferromagnetic exchange interactions between nearest neighbors, a longitudinal single-ion anisotropy, and a transverse single-ion anisotropy. Using a mean-field approach based on Bogoliubov's inequality for the Gibbs free energy, we derive the fundamental thermodynamic potential and the equation of state for the magnetization. The influence of the longitudinal and transverse anisotropy parameters on the magnetic ordering and phase transitions is analyzed in detail. We present magnetization versus temperature diagrams for various combinations of the anisotropies, exploring both positive and negative values. Our results reveal that the system exhibits standard second-order phase transitions for most parameter ranges, with no evidence of tricritical behavior. However, for certain positive values of the anisotropies, the model displays a first-order phase transition within the ordered phase, characterized by a jump from a higher-spin ordered state to a lower-spin ordered state. The critical temperatures are shown to be sensitive to the magnitude and sign of the anisotropy parameters. In particular, negative transverse anisotropies favor magnetic order, raising the critical temperature, while positive anisotropies promote disorder, lowering the critical temperature. This study provides a comprehensive analysis of the phase diagram of the \( S = 5/2 \) quantum Blume-Capel model and highlights the role of transverse fields in modifying the critical behavior.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过平均场方法研究了自旋S=5/2的量子Blume-Capel模型在横向和随机晶体场中的热力学性质，发现系统在多数参数范围内呈现二级相变，但在特定正各向异性下出现有序相内的一级相变，且横向各向异性的符号对临界温度有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 探究自旋S=5/2的量子Blume-Capel模型在横向和随机晶体场中的热力学行为，特别是各向异性参数对磁有序和相变的影响。
AI.method: 基于Bogoliubov不等式的平均场方法，推导吉布斯自由能的热力学势和磁化状态方程。
AI.result: 多数参数范围呈现标准二级相变，无三临界点；特定正各向异性下出现有序相内一级相变（高自旋有序态跳跃到低自旋有序态）；负横向各向异性提高临界温度，正横向各向异性降低临界温度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究全面分析了S=5/2量子Blume-Capel模型的相图，揭示了横向场在调控临界行为中的关键作用。

title: Accelerated Discovery of Nitrogen-Coordinated Dual-Atom Hydrogen Evolution Reaction Electrocatalysts via Machine Learning Potentials
summary: The hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) is central to sustainable hydrogen production, and nitrogen coordinated dual atom catalysts (DACs) offer a promising route to noble metal activity at low cost. Yet their vast compositional and coordination design space remains underexplored, as density functional theory (DFT) screening at scale is prohibitive. Here, we map the HER landscape of graphene supported TM2@Nx-Gr DACs, screening 23 transition metals across 20 nitrogen coordination motifs using a machine learning potential (MLP) benchmarked against DFT. Intermediate coordination (2N to 4N) consistently yields near-optimal ΔGH*, with Ti2@2Na, Mn2@2Na, Fe2@2Na, Cu2@2Na, Rh2@2Na, Zr2@2Na, Zr2@2Nb, Zr2@2Nc, Nb2@2Nc, Zr2@2Nd, Mn2@2Ne, Mn2@2Nf, Ti2@3Na, Au2@3Na, Fe2@3Na, Pd2@3Nb, Rh2@3Nc, Rh2@3Nd, Au2@3Nd, V2@4Na, Ti2@4Nb, Pd2@4Nb, Ti2@4Nc, Cr2@4Nd, Ni2@4Nd, Cu2@4Nd emerging as standout, synthesizable candidates, most exhibiting metallic or narrow gap (<0.25 eV) character. The MLP reaches near-DFT accuracy, with a mean absolute error of 80 meV for Gibbs binding free energies at orders of magnitude lower computational cost, establishing MLP driven screening as a practical engine for next-generation catalyst discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习势能（MLP）系统筛选了23种过渡金属在20种氮配位构型下的石墨烯支撑双原子催化剂（TM2@Nx-Gr）的析氢反应（HER）性能，发现中等配位（2N-4N）能稳定获得近最优ΔGH*，并鉴定出26种有前景的可合成候选催化剂，MLP计算成本远低于DFT，平均绝对误差仅80 meV。
AI.motivation: 氮配位双原子催化剂（DACs）具有替代贵金属催化HER的潜力，但其组成和配位设计空间极为庞大，传统DFT筛选成本过高，亟待高效的计算筛选方法。
AI.method: 采用机器学习势能（MLP）对石墨烯支撑的TM2@Nx-Gr双原子催化剂进行高通量筛选，覆盖23种过渡金属和20种氮配位构型，并以DFT为基准校验MLP精度。
AI.result: 中等氮配位（2N-4N）普遍产生近最优的ΔGH*；识别出26种性能优异的候选催化剂，多数具有金属性或窄带隙（<0.25 eV）；MLP预测ΔGH*的MAE仅为80 meV，计算成本大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: MLP驱动的高通量筛选能够以接近DFT的精度、极低的计算成本系统探索DACs的HER催化性能，为下一代催化剂发现提供了实用引擎。

title: Thermodynamic and magnetocaloric properties of a triangular spin-1/2 cluster with Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction
summary: We present a theoretical investigation of the magnetic and thermodynamic properties of the triangular spin-1/2 cluster with Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya (DM) interaction, described by a spin-1/2 Heisenberg Hamiltonian with antisymmetric exchange interactions. The energy spectrum and ground-state phase diagram reveal the presence of ferromagnetic (FM), ferrimagnetic (FI), and frustrated (FR) phases, strongly influenced by the total spin and the DM interaction. We analyze magnetization and susceptibility, showing that at low temperatures the system exhibits a characteristic 1/3 magnetization plateau, while thermal fluctuations suppress magnetic order at higher temperatures. The entropy and specific heat display residual entropies due to ground-state degeneracies, Schottky-type anomalies at intermediate temperatures, and additional low-temperature features related to phase transitions. Particular attention is given to the magnetocaloric effect (MCE), characterized by both direct and inverse regimes depending on the magnetic field variation. We find that the DM interaction enhances the complexity of the MCE, leading to nontrivial entropy variations as a function of the magnetic field. These results provide insights into the role of frustration and anisotropy in tuning the MCE of properties triangular spin clusters, with relevance to \mathrm{Cu}_{3}-based molecular magnets.

AI.tldr: 该论文理论上研究了具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的三角自旋-1/2团簇的磁性和热力学性质，发现了铁磁、亚铁磁和受挫相，分析了1/3磁化平台、残余熵、Schottky异常以及磁卡效应中直接和逆两种机制，揭示了DM相互作用对磁卡效应的复杂调控作用。
AI.motivation: 探究Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用对三角自旋-1/2团簇中磁性和热力学性质的影响，特别是对磁卡效应的调控机制，为Cu₃基分子磁体提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用具有反对称交换相互作用的spin-1/2 Heisenberg哈密顿量，通过解析求解能谱和基态相图，计算磁化率、比热、熵等热力学量，分析磁卡效应。
AI.result: 发现铁磁、亚铁磁和受挫三相；低温下存在1/3磁化平台；基态简并导致残余熵；中等温度出现Schottky异常；DM相互作用使磁卡效应呈现直接和逆两种机制，且增强了MCE的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: DM相互作用通过调控自旋阻挫和各向异性，显著影响三角自旋团簇的磁热性质，为设计基于Cu₃分子磁体的磁卡效应材料提供了理论依据。

title: Optical Cooling of Nuclear Spins in a CdTe/CdZnTe Quantum Well: The Impact of Kinetic Local Fields on Cooling Efficiency
summary: The efficiency of optical cooling of nuclear spins in a CdTe/CdZnTe quantum well is investigated as a function of an external magnetic field. Our results confirm that there is indeed an optimal external magnetic field for optical cooling. We associate it with the kinetic local field $B_{KL}$ defined by the heating rate of the spin-spin reservoir due to the fluctuations of the hyperfine interaction. We also propose an experimental technique for measuring $B_{KL}$. For our sample we find that $B_{KL}=1.0\pm0.4$ G and it is independent of the electron polarization and pump power. The measured values of the kinetic local fields are in good agreement with a theoretical calculation $B_{KL} = 0.7$ G, taking into account indirect spin-spin interactions of Cd and Te nuclear spins and their considerably different hyperfine constants. The hyperfine constants of the magnetic isotopes of Cd and Te in CdTe are estimated.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了CdTe/CdZnTe量子阱中核自旋光致冷却效率随外磁场的变化，确认了存在最佳磁场，并将其与动力学局域场B_KL联系起来，提出了测量B_KL的实验方法，实验值与理论计算吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 探究光致核自旋冷却效率与外磁场的关系，验证是否存在最佳磁场，并解释其物理机制。
AI.method: 通过测量不同外磁场下CdTe/CdZnTe量子阱中的光致核自旋冷却效率，结合动力学局域场B_KL（由超精细相互作用涨落引起的自旋-自旋库加热率定义）进行分析，并提出了测量B_KL的实验技术。
AI.result: 确认存在最佳外磁场；测得B_KL=1.0±0.4 G，且与电子极化和泵浦功率无关；理论计算B_KL=0.7 G，与实验值吻合良好；给出了CdTe中Cd和Te磁性同位素的超精细常数估计值。
AI.conclusion: 光致核自旋冷却存在最优磁场，该磁场由动力学局域场B_KL决定；B_KL可通过本文提出的方法测量；Cd和Te核自旋间的间接自旋-自旋相互作用及其不同超精细常数对B_KL有重要影响。

title: Surface Originated Cross-Field Anomalous Transport in Magnetoelectric Multilayers
summary: In material systems with slab geometry, the surface contribution to physical responses is commonly expected to diminish rapidly with increasing thickness, giving way to the bulk response. Here, we show that this conventional wisdom is violated in a class of gate-induced responses, including gate-induced orbital and spin magnetization as well as cross-field anomalous thermoelectric transport. We develop a general framework for these effects, which naturally decomposes the total response into surface- and bulk-contributions treated on equal footing. Remarkably, the volume-averaged surface contribution remains finite in the thick-slab limit and exhibits the same thickness scaling as the bulk term. Furthermore, the surface response originates from band geometric quantities distinct from those in the bulk, being constrained solely by surface symmetries. As a result, it can dominate the overall response when the bulk contribution is symmetry-forbidden. Taking MnBi$_2$Te$_4$ multilayers as an example, we predict a strong surface-dominated cross-field anomalous Nernst effect arising from surface Berry curvature, which is readily accessible to experimental detection. These findings reveal a previously overlooked significance of surface response and open a new direction in the study of surface quantum geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在门诱导的轨道/自旋磁化及反常热电输运中，表面贡献不会随厚度增加而衰减，反而与体相贡献具有相同的厚度标度，且可基于表面量子几何效应主导整体响应。
AI.motivation: 挑战"表面贡献随厚度增大而迅速衰减"的传统认知，揭示在门诱导响应中表面贡献被长期忽视的重要性。
AI.method: 构建了将总响应分解为表面和体相贡献的统一理论框架，两者被平等处理；并以MnBi₂Te₄多层结构为例进行数值预测。
AI.result: 表面贡献在厚板极限下依旧有限，与体相贡献具有相同的厚度标度；表面响应源自不同于体相的带几何量，仅受表面对称性约束；在MnBi₂Te₄中预测了由表面贝里曲率主导的强反常能斯特效应。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了表面响应此前被忽视的重要意义，为表面量子几何研究开辟了新方向。

title: Topological spin-texture transitions in van der Waals magnets revealed by X-ray Fourier transform holography
summary: Nontrivial topological spin-textures, such as skyrmions, merons, bimerons, and skyrmioniums, are envisioned as robust building blocks for future memory and logic devices. Controllable transformations between these states require a quantum-mechanical description of electronic degrees of freedom and atomic-scale insight beyond existing phenomenological models. Here, we report an atomic-scale investigation of topological phase transitions and their protection in the two-dimensional van der Waals ferromagnet Fe$_3$GeTe$_2$ (FGT) using a combined experimental-theoretical approach. Synchrotron-based Fourier transform holography directly images labyrinth domains, isolated skyrmions, mixed labyrinth-skyrmion phases, and skyrmion bags with high spatial resolution. We compare these observations to simulations based on an electronic lattice Hamiltonian that captures both metallicity and relativistic spin-orbit coupling in FGT. By systematically exploring a broad range of temperatures and magnetic fields, we map the mechanisms governing topological transitions and their stability. This sequential-integrated experimental-theoretical framework advances understanding of spin-texture interactions and enables precise control of external tuning parameters. Our results establish a platform for creating, stabilizing, and manipulating topological states, paving the way for engineered spin-texture transitions in next-generation spintronic technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验与理论相结合的方法，在二维范德华铁磁体Fe₃GeTe₂中原子尺度研究了拓扑自旋织构（如斯格明子、merons等）的相变及其保护机制，揭示了从迷宫畴到孤立斯格明子、混合相及斯格明子袋的转变，并建立了精确控制这些拓扑态的平台。
AI.motivation: 拓扑自旋织构（如斯格明子、merons、bimerons、skyrmioniums）被认为是未来存储和逻辑器件的稳健构建单元，但可控地实现这些态之间的转换需要超越现有唯象模型的量子力学描述和原子尺度洞察。
AI.method: 采用结合同步辐射傅里叶变换全息成像（实验）与基于电子晶格哈密顿量模拟（理论）的综合实验-理论框架，在二维范德华铁磁体Fe₃GeTe₂中系统研究温度和磁场对拓扑相变的影响。
AI.result: 直接成像了迷宫畴、孤立斯格明子、迷宫-斯格明子混合相以及斯格明子袋等拓扑态，并通过系统探索温度和磁场范围，揭示了拓扑转变及其稳定性的机制。
AI.conclusion: 该实验-理论综合框架推进了对自旋织构相互作用的理解，实现了对外部调控参数的精确控制，为在下一代自旋电子学技术中工程化自旋织构转变建立了平台。

title: Engineering Quantum Criticality in the Integer Quantum Hall Regime through a Screening Layer
summary: Disorder-induced localization of electrons and electron-electron interaction are among the most fundamental problems in condensed matter physics. In two-dimensional electron systems, extensive studies have led to the emergence of a scaling picture, characterized by a set of universal critical exponents that govern the transitions between the integer quantum Hall plateaus. From the temperature dependence of the plateau-to-plateau transitions, experiments primarily report k ~ 0.42, implying a dynamic exponent z = 1, consistent with a theoretical picture where electrons have a long-range (1/r) interaction. Theory also predicts that z = 2 for short-range electron interaction, but an experimental verification has remained elusive. Here, we directly probe the influence of Coulomb interaction on these transitions using a bilayer electron system confined to a GaAs double quantum well device. The two layers are in close proximity, with an interlayer distance approximately equal to the magnetic length at the relevant magnetic fields. By tuning the electron density in the top layer, we access both insulating and metallic phases of the electrons in this layer as a function of magnetic field, allowing in-situ control of the unscreened and screened interaction strengths in the bottom layer as it goes through its plateau-to-plateau transitions. In the unscreened case, we measure k ~ 0.42 consistent with the widely reported value. More importantly, when screening is introduced, k is reduced to ~ 0.22, implying z = 2. Our results provide direct experimental evidence for the role of electron-electron interaction in determining critical behavior in the quantum Hall regime, and demonstrate screening as a powerful tuning parameter for engineering quantum criticality.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过双层GaAs电子系统，原位调控层间库仑相互作用的屏蔽程度，直接实验证明了电子-电子相互作用决定了量子霍尔平台-平台相变中的临界行为。未屏蔽时临界指数k~0.42（对应动力学指数z=1），引入屏蔽后k降至~0.22（对应z=2），首次实验验证了短程相互作用下z=2的理论预测。
AI.motivation: 二维电子系统中无序诱导的局域化与电子-电子相互作用是凝聚态物理基本问题。已有实验广泛报道整数量子霍尔平台跃迁的临界指数k~0.42（对应长程1/r相互作用的z=1），但理论预测短程相互作用下z=2，始终缺乏实验验证。现有实验技术难以直接调控相互作用类型，因此需要设计新方案探测库仑相互作用对临界行为的影响。
AI.method: 构建GaAs双量子阱器件，两层电子系统间距≈磁长度。顶层电子密度可调，使其随磁场经历绝缘体-金属相变，从而原位控制底层在平台跃迁过程中所受的屏蔽与未屏蔽相互作用强度。测量底层在不同屏蔽条件下的跃迁温度依赖关系，提取临界指数k。
AI.result: 未屏蔽时测得k~0.42，与广泛报道值一致（对应z=1）。引入屏蔽后k降至~0.22，对应动力学指数z=2，首次实验验证短程相互作用的理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果直接证明了电子-电子相互作用（特别是其有效距离）是决定量子霍尔区临界行为的核心因素，并展示了静电屏蔽作为调控量子临界性的一种有力工具。

title: Carrier Localization in Pnictogen-Based Chalcohalides from Defect-Bound Hot Polarons
summary: Pnictogen-based solar absorbers have gained prominence as promising nontoxic and stable alternatives to lead-halide perovskites (LHPs), but are severely limited by carrier localization, preventing their performance from approaching those of LHPs. Recent efforts have uncovered routes to overcome carrier localization, but these early efforts only considered intrinsic factors. Herein, we push beyond these limited early efforts, examining the role of defects, not only on cold carriers but also hot carriers. Focusing on the structurally one-dimensional pnictogen chalcohalide BiSBr, we find that whilst this material intrinsically does not exhibit carrier localization, vacancies introduced during synthesis or post-treatment lead to pronounced extrinsic self-trapping via the formation of defect-bound hot polarons-excited charge-carriers strongly coupled to local defect-induced vibrational modes. These above-gap defect states divert hot carriers from cooling to the band edge, thus depleting the mobile carrier population. Our findings establish the key role of defect-bound hot polarons in mediating extrinsic localization and offer new mechanistic insights into the interplay between defects, lattice coupling, and excited-state charge-carrier transport, which are critical to designing efficient perovskite-inspired solar absorbers.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了缺陷（而非仅本征因素）通过形成缺陷束缚热极化子，导致pnictogen基太阳能吸收材料（如BiSBr）中载流子非本征局域化的关键机制，指出缺陷诱导的热极化子会消耗移动载流子，阻碍器件性能接近铅卤钙钛矿。
AI.motivation: 尽管pnictogen基材料是铅卤钙钛矿的无毒稳定替代品，但严重受限于载流子局域化。此前研究仅关注本征因素，忽略了缺陷对载流子的影响，尤其是对热载流子的作用。
AI.method: 以结构一维的pnictogen硫卤化物BiSBr为研究对象，系统分析合成或后处理过程中引入的空位缺陷对冷载流子与热载流子的影响，重点研究缺陷束缚热极化子的形成及其对载流子冷却和输运的作用。
AI.result: 发现BiSBr本征不表现出载流子局域化，但空位缺陷会通过形成缺陷束缚热极化子（激发电荷与局域缺陷诱导振动模式强耦合）导致显著的外禀自陷；这些带隙以上缺陷态使热载流子偏离向带边冷却的路径，从而消耗移动载流子群体。
AI.conclusion: 确立了缺陷束缚热极化子在介导外禀载流子局域化中的关键作用，为理解缺陷、晶格耦合与激发态电荷输运之间的相互作用提供了新机制洞察，对设计高效类钙钛矿太阳能吸收材料至关重要。

title: Carrier-coupled ultrafast structural dynamics and interlayer energy transport of supported transition metal dichalcogenide heterostructures
summary: Understanding the electronic coupling and energy flow across layered two-dimensional heterostructures (HSs) is crucial to the exploitation of carrier and phonon transports as well as thermal management in next-generation optoelectronic devices. By using reflection ultrafast electron diffraction, we directly examine photoinduced out-of-plane structural dynamics of supported MoS2/WS2 bilayer HSs and their individual monolayers. Experimental evidence reveals the launch of ultrafast carrier-coupled intralayer atomic motions due to interlayer charge transfer across the van der Waals (vdW) heterojunctions that is absent for individual monolayers. Such a notable carrier-lattice correlation is in addition to the electronic coupling manifested in the enhanced optical absorption for HSs. Also, different pathways of energy flow as a result of carrier-phonon coupling and phonon scattering are reported with the corresponding characteristic times. On longer timescales, relaxation of thermalized atomic motions can be sufficiently described by a thermal transport model. A higher thermal boundary conductance (TBC) across MoS2/WS2 HSs is obtained compared to those at the monolayer-substrate interfaces; however, the similar TBC values suggest comparable couplings of phonons across vdW contacts. These results further shed light on the optical, phonon, and interfacial thermal properties of vertically-stacked vdW HSs.

AI.tldr: 通过反射超快电子衍射，研究了MoS2/WS2双层异质结中光致面外结构动力学，发现层间电荷转移驱动的超快载流子耦合层内原子运动，以及不同时间尺度下的能量流路径和热边界传导特性。
AI.motivation: 理解层状二维异质结中电子耦合和能量流对载流子和声子传输以及热管理至关重要，但目前对异质结中光致面外结构动力学的直接实验研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 采用反射超快电子衍射技术，直接研究MoS2/WS2双层异质结及其单层的超快面外结构动力学。
AI.result: 层间电荷转移引发载流子-晶格耦合的层内原子运动；观察到不同路径的能量流及其特征时间；MoS2/WS2异质结的热边界传导率高于单层-衬底界面，但不同vdW接触间TBC值相近。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了垂直堆叠vdW异质结的光学、声子及界面热特性，为下一代光电器件中的载流子和热管理提供了重要见解。

title: Prototype-Guided Latent Alignment for Data-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Molecular Foundation Models
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have transformed materials discovery by leveraging graph neural networks (GNNs) to predict material properties with near density functional theory (DFT) accuracy. While large-scale pretrained foundation models offer transferable baseline representations, they frequently struggle to generalise to out-of-distribution (OOD) target systems -- a common challenge in modelling complex or chemically diverse materials. Fine-tuning is the standard remedy, but the high cost of generating DFT-labelled configurations confines adaptation to data-scarce regimes, where over-parameterised GNNs amplify overfitting and degrade target-domain performance. To address this, we propose a prototype-based alignment approach for data-efficient fine-tuning of MLIPs. Our method identifies local structural similarities between the source and target domains by grouping atoms with analogous chemical environments based on their latent representations. Each target-domain atom's energy contribution is aligned to its source-domain prototype, introducing an inductive bias that anchors fine-tuned representations to the pretrained structure, encouraging effective reuse of learned interactions and improving generalisation without restrictive assumptions on the target chemistry. We evaluate our method on the rMD17 benchmark using equivariant MACE and invariant SchNet across varying data budgets, and extend evaluation to the MACE-OFF foundation models on the SPICE dataset. Our approach consistently improves predictive accuracy in the low-data regime, reducing energy MAE by up to 18% over standard fine-tuning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原型对齐的方法，用于数据高效的微调机器学习原子间势（MLIPs），通过将目标域原子能量贡献对齐到源域原型，在低数据 regime 下显著提升泛化能力，能量 MAE 降低最高 18%。
AI.motivation: 大规模预训练的基础模型在处理分布外（OOD）目标系统时泛化能力不足，而微调又面临DFT标注数据成本高、数据稀缺导致过参数化GNN过拟合的问题。
AI.method: 提出原型对齐方法：识别源域和目标域之间的局部结构相似性，将目标域原子按其化学环境聚类到源域原型，将目标域原子的能量贡献对齐到对应原型，引入归纳偏置锚定微调表示到预训练结构。
AI.result: 在rMD17基准上使用MACE和SchNet，以及在SPICE数据集上使用MACE-OFF基础模型进行验证，在低数据 regime 下相比标准微调基线，能量MAE降低最高18%。
AI.conclusion: 原型对齐方法有效提升了MLIPs在数据稀缺场景下的微调性能，为材料发现中预训练模型的迁移学习提供了高效且无限制性假设的解决方案。

title: Coherent and Dissipative Spin Torques in Quantum Dots: A Unified Framework for Quantum Spin Dynamics
summary: The manipulation of single spins through spin-polarized tunneling opens new routes for quantum control at the atomic scale. We present a theoretical framework describing spin-transfer, spin torques and spin resonance in molecular quantum dots weakly coupled to magnetic electrodes. By deriving a Lindblad master equation from microscopic tunneling processes, we capture both coherent exchange interactions and dissipative spin torque effects within a unified approach. We analyze how charge transport through localized orbitals influences spin dynamics and show that modulating the tunneling rates in time can induce electron spin resonance. This framework is further extended to coupled spin systems, revealing how spin coherence and entanglement respond to local spin torques and highlighting sources of transport-driven decoherence. Our results provide a general model to interpret spin-resolved tunneling experiments and extend classical spin torque concepts into the quantum regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的理论框架，通过推导Lindblad主方程，描述了弱耦合分子量子点中自旋转移、自旋转矩和自旋共振的量子动力学机制，揭示了电荷输运如何影响自旋动力学，并扩展至耦合自旋系统的相干性与纠缠行为。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏一个统一的理论来描述自旋极化隧穿中同时存在的相干交换相互作用和耗散性自旋转矩效应，尤其是在分子量子点体系中。作者希望将经典的自旋转矩概念推广到量子 regime，为解释自旋分辨隧穿实验提供一般性模型。
AI.method: 从微观隧穿过程出发推导Lindblad主方程，统一处理相干交换相互作用和耗散性自旋转矩；分析电荷输运通过局域轨道对自旋动力学的影响；通过时间调制隧穿率诱导电子自旋共振；扩展至耦合自旋系统以研究自旋相干性和纠缠对局域自旋转矩的响应。
AI.result: 成功建立了统一的Lindblad主方程框架，捕获了自旋转移、自旋转矩和自旋共振效应；证明时间调制隧穿率可诱导ESR；揭示耦合自旋系统中自旋相干性和纠缠受局域自旋转矩影响，并指出了输运驱动的退相干来源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为解释自旋分辨隧穿实验提供了通用模型，将经典自旋转矩概念成功拓展到量子领域，对原子尺度量子控制和自旋电子学有重要指导意义。

title: Charting the thermodynamic stability of hybrid perovskite alloys with machine learning
summary: Alloy-based perovskite solar cells offer tunable properties and improved stability, but their complexity has impeded accurate modeling, hindering development. We present a machine-learning (ML) accelerated atomistic modeling approach for the phase stability of (Cs/FA)Pb(Br/I)3 and (Cs/FA)Sn(Br/I)3 perovskites, with FA being formamidinium. To make such quaternary alloys tractable, we adopt a two-level ML strategy, combining 1) graph neural network interatomic potentials trained on density functional theory data for efficient structure relaxations with 2) secondary ML models for direct energy prediction from unrelaxed structures. These models enable computations of free energy landscapes across compositions and phases, capturing alloy disorder and FA molecular orientations. Our results reveal narrower stable composition regions for the Sn-based system compared to its Pb-based counterpart, limiting options for compositional engineering. Maximum stability occurs at high I content, and no stabilization is observed near the center of the composition space. Our results guide the design of stable perovskites.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种机器学习加速的原子建模方法，用于分析(Cs/FA)Pb(Br/I)3和(Cs/FA)Sn(Br/I)3钙钛矿的相稳定性。通过两级ML策略（图神经网络势函数+二级ML能量预测模型），计算了跨组分和相的自由能景观。结果显示Sn基体系稳定组分区域更窄，最大稳定性在高I含量处，中间组分无稳定化效应。
AI.motivation: 合金基钙钛矿太阳能电池虽具有可调性能和更好的稳定性，但其复杂性阻碍了精确建模，限制了材料开发。因此需要一种高效准确的建模方法来指导稳定钙钛矿的设计。
AI.method: 采用两级机器学习策略：1) 基于密度泛函理论数据训练的图神经网络原子间势函数，用于高效结构弛豫；2) 二级ML模型直接从未弛豫结构预测能量。这些模型可计算跨组分和相的自由能景观，捕捉合金无序和FA分子取向。
AI.result: Sn基体系相比Pb基体系具有更窄的稳定组分区域，限制了组分工程的选择空间；最大稳定性出现在高I含量区域；组分空间中心附近未观察到稳定化效应。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果为指导稳定钙钛矿的设计提供了方向，明确了不同金属基钙钛矿的稳定组分区域及其限制条件。

title: Induced nonlinear phase shift of forward volume spin waves in magnetic films and one-dimensional magnonic crystals
summary: A differential phase shift of a low-power spin wave (SW) induced by a high-power pumping wave co-propagating at different frequencies in perpendicularly magnetized magnetic films has been studied. We find that this effect for forward volume SWs propagating in yttrium iron garnet (YIG) films is stronger than that for surface SWs propagating in tangentially magnetized films. The results show that the induced nonlinear phase shift up to 180° takes place for pumping wave power of a few milliwatts. The phenomenon paves the way for fast and energy-efficient control of one-dimensional magnon transport.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了低功率自旋波受高功率泵浦波诱导的微分相移效应，发现钇铁石榴石薄膜中正向体积自旋波的效应强于表面自旋波，数毫瓦泵浦功率即可实现高达180°的非线性相移，为快速高效的一维磁子传输控制提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索如何利用高功率泵浦波对低功率自旋波进行非线性相位控制，以实现快速、节能的一维磁子传输调控。
AI.method: 实验研究了不同频率下共传播的高功率泵浦波对低功率自旋波产生的微分相移，比较了正向体积自旋波（垂直磁化薄膜）与表面自旋波（切向磁化薄膜）两种模式下的效应强度。
AI.result: 1) 正向体积自旋波的非线性相移效应强于表面自旋波；2) 在仅数毫瓦的泵浦功率下，即可实现高达180°的非线性相移。
AI.conclusion: 该现象为快速、能量高效的一维磁子传输控制铺平了道路，在自旋波器件中具有重要应用潜力。

title: Magnetic precession induced spin accumulation in collinear antiferromagnets
summary: Generating and characterizing uniform and staggered spin polarization in antiferromagnets is one of the key challenges for antiferromagnetic spintronic technology. Here, we perform perturbative theory, group-theoretical symmetry analysis, low energy and ab initio simulations to propose that the magnetic precession near the equilibrium magnetic axis could generate finite uniform and staggered spin polarization at the opposite magnetic sublattices (referring to total magnetic and Néel vector generation) in a single AFM semiconductors. This response does not require the heterojunction setup and could eliminate the lattice mismatch issues at the junction. Through scrutinizing all symmetrically-protected vanishing magnetic moment groups and especially focusing on parity-time (PT ) invariant groups, we identify the symmetry constraints that describe the staggered spin accumulation responses, and disclose their fieldlike and dampinglike characters. This unravels a hidden spin accumulation mode in AFM semiconductors. Furthermore, we simulate such an effect using a perturbative approach and suggest that electric gate field and Floquet light-dressing can effectively manipulate these responses.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微扰理论、群论对称性分析、低能及第一性原理模拟，提出反铁磁半导体中磁进动可在相反磁子晶格上产生均匀和交错的自旋极化（总磁矩和奈尔矢量生成），无需异质结结构，并揭示了对称性约束下的隐藏自旋积累模式，同时论证电场和Floquet光调控可有效操控该响应。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁自旋电子学的关键技术挑战之一是在反铁磁体中生成并表征均匀和交错的自旋极化，现有方法多依赖异质结结构，存在晶格失配问题，亟需探索无需异质结的新途径。
AI.method: 采用微扰理论、群论对称性分析、低能有效模型及第一性原理模拟相结合的方法，系统分析PT不变群及其他对称性保护的消失磁矩群，识别自旋积累的对称性约束，并利用微扰方法模拟电场和Floquet光调控效果。
AI.result: 发现反铁磁半导体中磁进动可分别在不同磁子晶格上产生场致和阻尼致特性的均匀与交错自旋极化；揭示了隐藏在PT对称性保护下的自旋积累模式；论证了栅极电场和Floquet光场均能有效调控该响应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种无需异质结、在单一反铁磁半导体中产生自旋极化的新机制，有效避免了晶格失配问题，为反铁磁自旋电子学器件设计提供了新的物理原理和调控手段。

title: Hysteretic Acoustic Band Structures in Shape-Memory Composite Thin Rods
summary: We investigate the propagation of longitudinal elastic waves in one-dimensional periodic composite rods composed of alternating segments of a shape-memory alloy (NiTiCu) and a polymer spacer (Parylene C). In the thin-rod regime, the longitudinal phase velocity reduces to $c=\sqrt{E/ρ}$, which coincides with the regime in which the elastic modulus of NiTiCu has been measured directly through its acoustic response across the martensitic transformation. Using the standard transfer-matrix method along the heating and cooling branches of the transformation separately, we compute the Bloch band structure of the infinite periodic system and the transmission spectrum of finite composite rods. Because the elastic modulus of NiTiCu follows different paths upon heating and cooling, the same external temperature within the transformation interval corresponds to two different phase fractions and, consequently, to two different phononic spectra. The resulting hysteresis of the underlying material is thus transferred to the collective acoustic response of the periodic structure: stop-band edges trace closed loops in the temperature--frequency plane, and the transmission coefficient of a finite rod at a fixed temperature depends on the previous thermal history. We further show that the geometric filling fraction of the active segment provides a complementary tuning mechanism, modifying the width of the spectral hysteresis loops and the position of specific gap closures independently of temperature. These results illustrate how a first-order structural phase transition with intrinsic thermal hysteresis manifests itself in the dispersion relation of a periodic elastic medium.

AI.tldr: 本文研究形状记忆合金（NiTiCu）与聚合物（Parylene C）交替组成的一维周期复合杆中纵波传播。由于NiTiCu在马氏体相变中弹性模量存在热滞回线，周期结构的声子带隙也表现出热滞回现象，使得传输谱依赖于热历史。几何填充比可独立调节滞回环宽度与带隙闭合位置。
AI.motivation: 探究具有一阶结构相变（含热滞）的材料在周期弹性介质中的集体声学响应特征，揭示材料本征滞回如何传递到周期结构的色散关系中。
AI.method: 采用薄杆近似（纵波相速度c=√(E/ρ)），利用标准传递矩阵方法分别沿加热和冷却分支计算无限周期系统的Bloch能带结构及有限周期复合杆的透射谱。
AI.result: （1）相同温度下，加热和冷却分支对应不同相分数，从而得到不同的声子谱；（2）阻带边缘在温度-频率平面形成闭合滞回环；（3）固定温度下有限杆的透射系数依赖热历史；（4）几何填充比可独立调节滞回环宽度和特定带隙闭合位置。
AI.conclusion: 首次展示具有固有热滞的一阶结构相变如何体现在周期弹性介质的色散关系中，材料滞回被传递到周期结构的集体声学响应，填充比提供了独立的调谐自由度。

title: Towards exascale fully relativistic pseudopotential density functional theory calculations enabled by mixed-precision computation and compressed-communication using residual based subspace iteration
summary: Noncollinear (NC) magnetism and spin-orbit coupling (SOC) are indispensable for predictive ab initio materials simulations with pronounced relativistic effects and magnetic frustration, yet they significantly increase the cost of cubic-scaling density functional theory (DFT) by introducing complex 2-component wavefunctions per electron and consequently much larger eigenproblems. We present a GPU-centric high-performance framework for NC-SOC DFT that combines: (i) algorithmic advances for solving finite-element (FE) discretized DFT equations; (ii) residual-based Chebyshev filtered subspace iteration (R-ChFSI), tolerant to inexact matrix-vector products, for the resulting sparse generalized eigenproblem; (iii) a matrix-free strategy for accelerating FE Poisson solver; (iv) R-ChFSI-enabled mixed-precision computation with block floating-point compressed MPI communication at compression ratios over 4x, preserving double-precision robustness while reducing compute and data movement costs; and (v) a communication efficient band-partitioning algorithm to improve scalability. Numerical results demonstrate improved time-to-solution and excellent scaling on exascale architectures, enabling fully relativistic pseudopotential DFT simulations of up to 100,000 electrons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向GPU的NC-SOC DFT高性能计算框架，结合有限元离散化、残差Chebyshev滤波子空间迭代、无矩阵泊松求解器、混合精度计算与高效通信算法，实现了多达10万电子的全相对论赝势DFT模拟。
AI.motivation: 非共线磁性和自旋轨道耦合在含强相对论效应和磁阻挫的材料模拟中不可或缺，但传统立方标度DFT因引入复杂两分量波函数导致特征值问题规模剧增，计算成本高昂。
AI.method: (i) 有限元离散化DFT方程；(ii) 残差Chebyshev滤波子空间迭代(R-ChFSI)处理稀疏广义特征值问题；(iii) 无矩阵策略加速有限元泊松求解器；(iv) R-ChFSI支持的混合精度计算与块浮点压缩MPI通信（压缩比>4倍）；(v) 通信高效的能带划分算法。
AI.result: 在百亿亿次架构上实现了更优的计算时间和出色的可扩展性，支持多达10万电子的全相对论赝势DFT模拟。
AI.conclusion: 该GPU-centric框架通过算法-硬件协同优化，有效克服了NC-SOC DFT的计算瓶颈，为大规模相对论材料模拟提供了可行的高性能方案。

title: Composition-dependent Thin-film Synthesis of Layered Ternary Iron Nitrides FeMN2 (M = W, Mo)
summary: Ternary transition-metal nitrides with layered crystal structures host anisotropic bonding and reduced dimensionality that may enable unconventional electronic and magnetic behavior. Yet, synthesis of such nitride thin films remains challenging because reactive sputtering often favors metastable rocksalt-derived structures. We report the composition-dependent synthesis, structure, and properties of layered FeMN2 (M = W, Mo) thin films with triangular Fe sublattices, prepared by reactive sputtering and post-deposition NH3 annealing. Using synchrotron grazing-incidence wide-angle X-ray scattering (GIWAXS) and X-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS), we investigate the evolution of phase formation, crystallographic texture, and local Fe coordination across composition. Both layered phase form over broad composition ranges. FeWN2 maintains high phase purity across compositions, consistent with cation substitution, whereas FeMoN2 only exhibits good phase purity at Fe-poor compositions. Azimuthal GIWAXS analysis shows that Fe-rich films in both systems exhibit out-of-plane fiber texture, which progressively evolves toward predominantly in-plane orientation near stoichiometry in FeWN2, while FeMoN2 develops a more randomly oriented polycrystalline microstructure. Electrical measurements reveal relatively low and composition-insensitive resistivity in FeWN2 (~1 mΩ.cm), whereas FeMoN2 exhibits a pronounced resistivity maximum near nominal stoichiometry. Preliminary room-temperature magnetization measurements on FeWN2 further reveal weak ferromagnetic-like behavior in Fe-poor films, while stoichiometric compositions remain predominantly paramagnetic. These results demonstrate fundamentally different structural accommodation mechanisms in FeWN2 and FeMoN2, and highlight the strong coupling between composition, microstructure, and electronic/magnetic properties in layered nitride thin films.

AI.tldr: 本文通过反应溅射和后沉积NH3退火成功制备了具有层状结构的FeMN₂ (M=W, Mo)薄膜，系统研究了成分对相形成、织构、电学和磁学性质的影响，发现FeWN₂与FeMoN₂在结构稳定性和性质上存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 层状三元过渡金属氮化物具有各向异性键合和降低的维度，可能展现非常规电子和磁学行为，但这类氮化物薄膜的合成因反应溅射倾向于形成亚稳态岩盐衍生结构而具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用反应溅射结合后沉积NH₃退火制备层状FeMN₂ (M=W, Mo)薄膜；利用同步辐射掠入射广角X射线散射(GIWAXS)和X射线吸收光谱(XAS)表征相形成、晶体织构和局域Fe配位。
AI.result: FeWN₂在宽成分范围内保持高相纯度，而FeMoN₂仅在贫Fe成分下具有良好相纯度；FeWN₂电阻率低且对成分不敏感(~1 mΩ·cm)，FeMoN₂则显示出电阻率最大值；FeWN₂贫Fe薄膜表现出弱铁磁行为，而化学计量比成分保持顺磁性。
AI.conclusion: FeWN₂和FeMoN₂在结构容纳机制上存在根本差异，成分、微观结构与电子/磁学性质之间存在强耦合关系。

title: What drives performance in molecular MPNNs? An operator-level factorial benchmark
summary: Message-passing neural networks (MPNNs) are widely used for molecular property prediction, but their deployment as monolithic architectures makes it difficult to identify how specific message-passing operators affect performance. We present an operator-level factorial benchmark that decomposes 2D molecular MPNNs into the three families of message-seed initialization, node-edge fusion, and node update operators. The resulting 84 configurations are benchmarked on ten MoleculeNet datasets under a shared experimental setup and statistical analysis protocol. Across this controlled design, performance variation is associated primarily with message construction rather than update complexity. Message-seed initialization shows significant family-level effects for both regression and classification, node-edge fusion shows a significant family-level effect for regression with descriptive advantages for concatenation-based mixing, and the update family shows no statistically supported effect for either endpoint family. A representation probe into the Quinethazone molecule further demonstrates that concatenation-based mixing can better differentiate chemically distinct heteroatoms and withstand oversmoothing than Hadamard gating. Representative configurations selected separately for classification and regression recover competitive performance relative to established molecular graph neural network (GNN) baselines, ranking numerically best on eight of ten benchmark datasets. These empirical results are interpreted through concise mechanistic analyses of representative node-edge fusion and update operators. Our findings provide empirical design heuristics for molecular MPNNs by turning model design from a search over monolithic architectures into a targeted assessment of where and how chemical information enters the message-passing pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文通过操作级因子分解实验，将2D分子MPNN分解为消息种子初始化、节点-边融合和节点更新三个算子家族，在84种配置下进行系统基准测试，发现消息构建（尤其是消息种子初始化和节点-边融合）对性能影响显著，而更新算子影响不显著，为分子GNN设计提供了经验性启发。
AI.motivation: MPNN在分子性质预测中广泛使用，但作为整体架构难以识别具体消息传递算子对性能的影响，作者希望将模型设计从搜索整体架构转变为有针对性地评估化学信息进入消息传递管线的位置和方式。
AI.method: 将2D分子MPNN分解为消息种子初始化、节点-边融合和节点更新三个算子家族，构建84种配置，在MoleculeNet十个数据集上进行统一实验设置和统计分析，并通过Quinethazone分子进行表征探测。
AI.result: 消息构建（种子初始化和节点-边融合）主导性能变化；更新算子无统计显著影响；连接型融合优于Hadamard门控，能更好区分不同杂原子并抵抗过平滑；代表性配置在十个数据集中的八个上取得数值最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 分子MPNN的设计应聚焦于消息构建而非更新复杂度，连接型融合具有描述性优势，为分子GNN设计提供了可操作的经验启发。

title: Role of structure and charge trapping on the bipolaron formation and magnetic-field response of gated conjugated polymers
summary: Conjugated polymers exhibit unique spin-dependent phenomena arising from weak yet critical hyperfine interactions. Understanding these spin effects, particularly the spin-dependent formation and decay of correlated spin pairs, is important for advancing both organic electronics and polymer-based spintronics. Intrinsic magnetic-field responses such as magnetoresistance have primarily been investigated in diode architectures, where electrons and holes coexist. However, such systems are less suitable for probing bipolaron formation in unipolar transport, and the relationship between polymer structure and bipolaron formation in lightly doped polymers remains unclear. Here, we systematically investigate intrinsic magnetoresistance in representative conjugated polymers using field-effect transistors and observe a generally positive magnetoresistance. First-principles simulations reveal that bipolarons preferentially form on short conjugated segments associated with amorphous regions. Moreover, comparisons across these polymers show that enhanced charge trapping correlates with stronger magnetoresistance, implying promoted bipolaron formation. Bipolaron-incorporated energylevel-alignment modeling near metal/polymer interfaces suggests that charge traps can increase the bipolaron density.

AI.tldr: 本文通过场效应晶体管系统研究了代表性共轭聚合物的本征磁电阻，发现普遍为正磁电阻。第一性原理模拟表明双极化子优先在无序区的短共轭段形成，且电荷陷阱增强与磁电阻增大相关，表明陷阱促进了双极化子形成。
AI.motivation: 理解共轭聚合物中的自旋依赖现象（特别是双极化子形成）对有机电子学和聚合物自旋电子学至关重要，但现有二极管架构不适用于研究单极输运中的双极化子，且聚合物结构与双极化子形成的关系尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用场效应晶体管测量本征磁电阻，结合第一性原理模拟和能级对齐建模。
AI.result: 共轭聚合物普遍呈现正磁电阻；双极化子优先在非晶区的短共轭段形成；电荷陷阱增强与磁电阻增大正相关；陷阱可增加金属/聚合物界面附近的双极化子密度。
AI.conclusion: 电荷陷阱通过促进双极化子形成来增强磁电阻，揭示了聚合物结构、陷阱态与磁电阻之间的内在关联。

title: Exploring the Origins of Anti-Ambipolarity in BBL Polymer: Links to Redox Chemistry, Electronic Structure, and Structural Dynamics
comment: 38 pages (includes main text and Supplemental Information), 14 figures (main text), 9 figures (Supplemental Information)
summary: We examine the intrinsic physical-chemical properties of the conjugated ladder-type polymer poly(benzimidazobenzophenanthroline) (BBL) in response to electron transfer. We aim at explaining the origin of the anti-ambipolar behavior behind the observed BBL nonlinear response associated with specific device architectures. To elucidate this point, we use theory and computation based on first principles, including density functional theory optimizations, ab initio molecular dynamics, time-dependent DFT, and Marcus-theory analysis. Our results reveal that this redox response is not simply monotonic but follows an alternating odd/even pattern in which gap narrowing and reopening occur sequentially before near-gapless behavior emerges at high charging. Converging theoretical evidence in this work demonstrates that bell shaped conductivity in BBL originates in its fundamental electronic structure and supramolecular organization.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算（DFT、AIMD、TD-DFT、Marcus理论）揭示了共轭梯形聚合物BBL的氧化还原响应呈现奇/偶交替的带隙变化模式，最终在高电荷态下形成近无带隙行为，证明其钟形电导率源于基础电子结构和超分子组织。
AI.motivation: 解释BBL非线性响应中反双极性行为的起源，即为什么该材料的电导率呈现钟形（而非单调变化）特征。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理的理论与计算：密度泛函理论优化、从头算分子动力学、含时密度泛函理论、Marcus理论分析。
AI.result: 氧化还原响应呈现奇/偶交替模式（gap narrowing和reopening交替出现），高电荷态下出现近无带隙行为。
AI.conclusion: BBL的钟形电导率起源于其基础电子结构和超分子组织，而非简单的单调响应。
